extract: Zarude (Japanese: ザルード Zarude) is a dual-type Dark/Grass Mythical Pokémon introduced during Generation VIII, in The Isle of Armor. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, a unique Zarude named Dada Zarude was featured in the 23rd Pokémon movie Secrets of the Jungle. It was revealed on Pokémon Day 2020. It is the last Pokémon in the Isle of Armor Pokédex.
